glosses.vi: nổi bật; thu hút sự chú ý
glosses.pl: rzucać się w oczy; zwracać uwagę
glosses.ro: a ieși în evidență; a atrage atenția
glosses.ja: 目立つ; 注意を引く

translations.en: You can notice that right away.
translations.fr: Tu le remarques tout de suite.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể nhận ra điều đó ngay.
translations.hi: यह तुम्हें तुरंत नज़र आ जाएगा.
translations.nb: Det legger du merke til med en gang.
translations.da: Det lægger du mærke til med det samme.
translations.ja: それはすぐに気づける。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative/personal pronoun in nominative singular neuter functioning as subject.
Modal auxiliary, 3rd person singular present, expressing possibility.
Personal pronoun in dative singular; dative experiencer required by 'auffallen'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.

tokens.surface_en: to be noticeable; to stand out
tokens.explanation: Separable-prefix lexical verb (auf- + fallen), here as bare infinitive governed by the modal 'kann'; subject = 'Das', dative experiencer = 'dir'.

sentences.target: Mir würde das in der Küche auffallen.
sentences.reading: /miːɐ̯ ˈvʏʁdə das ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈkʏçə ˈaʊ̯fˌfalən/

translations.de: Mir würde das in der Küche auffallen.
translations.ipa: /miːɐ̯ ˈvʏʁdə das ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈkʏçə ˈaʊ̯fˌfalən/
translations.en: I would notice that in the kitchen.
translations.es: En la cocina me daría cuenta de eso.
translations.fr: Je le remarquerais dans la cuisine.
translations.zh-Hans: 在厨房我会注意到这点。
translations.yue: 喺廚房我會留意到呢樣嘢。
translations.ru: На кухне я бы это заметил.
translations.vi: Trong bếp tôi sẽ nhận ra điều đó.
translations.nl: In de keuken zou ik dat merken.
translations.uk: На кухні я б це помітив.
translations.hi: रसोई में वह मुझे नज़र आ जाता.
translations.nb: På kjøkkenet ville jeg lagt merke til det.
translations.sv: I köket skulle jag märka det.
translations.cs: V kuchyni bych si toho všiml.
translations.da: I køkkenet ville jeg lægge mærke til det.
translations.ja: キッチンならそれに気づくと思う。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in dative singular; fronted dative experiencer licensed by 'auffallen'.
Auxiliary 'werden' in Konjunktiv II (würde) forming a conditional construction.
Demonstrative/personal pronoun in nominative singular neuter functioning as subject.
Preposition governing dative here (static location).
Definite article, dative singular feminine with 'Küche'.
Common noun; head of the prepositional phrase 'in der Küche' (locative adjunct).

tokens.surface_en: to be noticeable; to stand out
tokens.explanation: Separable-prefix lexical verb in infinitive, complement of the auxiliary 'würde'; subject = 'das', dative experiencer = 'Mir'.

translations.en: She doesn’t want to stand out.
translations.fr: Elle ne veut pas se faire remarquer.
translations.vi: Cô ấy không muốn gây chú ý.
translations.ar: هي لا تريد أن تلفت الانتباه.
translations.nb: Hun vil ikke skille seg ut.
translations.ro: Nu vrea să iasă în evidență.
translations.da: Hun vil ikke skille sig ud.
translations.ja: 彼女は目立ちたくない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative, functioning as subject.
Modal auxiliary, 3rd person singular present, expressing volition.
Negation particle scoping over the infinitival verb phrase.

tokens.surface_en: to be noticeable; to stand out
tokens.explanation: Separable-prefix lexical verb in infinitive, complement of the modal 'will'; negated by 'nicht'.

sentences.target: In der Schule kann sowas schnell auffallen.
sentences.reading: /ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə kan ˈzoːvas ʃnɛl ˈaʊ̯fˌfalən/

translations.de: In der Schule kann sowas schnell auffallen.
translations.ipa: /ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə kan ˈzoːvas ʃnɛl ˈaʊ̯fˌfalən/
translations.en: At school, stuff like that gets noticed quickly.
translations.es: En la escuela esas cosas se notan rápido.
translations.fr: À l’école, ce genre de choses se remarque vite.
translations.it: A scuola, cose del genere si notano in fretta.
translations.zh-Hans: 在学校，这种事很快就会被发现。
translations.yue: 喺學校呢啲嘢好快就會畀人發現。
translations.pt: Na escola, coisas assim são percebidas rápido.
translations.he: בבית הספר שמים לב לדברים כאלה מהר.
translations.tr: Okulda böyle şeyler çabucak fark edilir.
translations.vi: Ở trường, những chuyện như vậy bị phát hiện rất nhanh.
translations.ar: في المدرسة تُلاحظ مثل هذه الأمور بسرعة.
translations.nl: Op school valt zoiets snel op.
translations.hu: Az iskolában az ilyesmit gyorsan észreveszik.
translations.hi: स्कूल में ऐसी बातें जल्दी पकड़ में आ जाती हैं.
translations.pl: W szkole takie rzeczy szybko widać.
translations.el: Στο σχολείο τέτοια πράγματα φαίνονται γρήγορα.
translations.nb: På skolen blir sånt fort lagt merke til.
translations.id: Di sekolah, hal seperti itu cepat ketahuan.
translations.ro: La școală, astfel de lucruri se observă repede.
translations.cs: Ve škole si takových věcí rychle všimnou.
translations.da: I skolen bliver sådan noget hurtigt opdaget.
translations.ja: 学校ではそういうことはすぐに気づかれる。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative (static location).
Definite article, dative singular feminine with 'Schule'.
Common noun; head of the prepositional phrase 'In der Schule' (locative adjunct).
Modal auxiliary, 3rd person singular present, expressing possibility.
Colloquial fused form of 'so etwas'; indefinite pronoun functioning as subject.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb phrase.

tokens.surface_en: to be noticeable; to stand out
tokens.explanation: Separable-prefix lexical verb in infinitive governed by the modal 'kann'; the subject is 'sowas'.
